payload.title: Serve HTTPS with a CA-signed leaf cert
payload.description:
Issue a leaf cert signed by the local CA covering: scope.local, localhost, 127.0.0.1, and current LAN IPv4/IPv6 addresses (SANs). Switch the express server from http.createServer to https.createServer using the leaf. Auto-reissue if the SAN set changes (LAN IP moved) or the cert is within 30 days of expiry.

Acceptance:
- https://scope.local:<port> serves the UI
- Cert chains to the local CA; `openssl s_client` validates after trusting the CA
- Leaf validity: 90 days, auto-reissued on startup if <30 days remain
- LAN IP change between runs triggers a fresh leaf

Depends on the CA story.
